title: Shaver Replacment Heads Compatible with Remington Balder RX7/XR1600/BOSS XR7120 and XR7100 Head Shaver (2 Pack)
features: 【Compatible Model】：compatible with Remington Balder Pro Head Shaver（RX7/XR1600/BOSS XR7120 and XR7100），Not fit for （RX5/XR7000/XR1500） shaver heads
【Material】: 360 Degrees without Dead Ends .Round head design perfectly protect your skin from scratching You can enjoy a safe and smooth shaving without scratching.

【Easy to Install】: You can replace the shaving heads in a few minutes.place a tiny drop of baby oil on each heads and allow shaver to run for 10 seconds after installation ,to ensure your shaver run properly and smoothly.
【Warm Tip】:To keep Your Shavers Super Performance.We recommend that you replace shaving heads every 12 months

Double Track Cutter 360 Degrees without Dead Ends . 2-Round head design perfectly protect your skin from scratching.You can enjoy a safe and smooth shaving without scratching. Full face use This shaver replacement head provides you with the best hair removal experience. Help you shave facial hair, trim and comb hair in all aspects.
